calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-30-2008 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-30-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances on Wednesday, July 30, 2008: John P. Zanghi, counsel for plaintiff John Stewart Company; David Hasbrouck, representative, appearing on behalf of plaintiff; Alex Saunders, Esquire, by limited scope representation for defendant Daniel R. Miller, who is also present

Settlement conference held. Parties enter into a signed agreement, which is filed with the Court. See scanned document for settlement terms contained in the signed agreement for the premises located at 140 Jones Street, Unit #512, San Francisco, California. The August 4, 2008 trial date is vacated.

Judge Pro Tem Ernst Halperin, Clerk L. Fong, not reported (218)
